title: Leszno Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Leszno with a Z-Score of -3.20. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Leszno are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score deviation from the norm. 
 The relative humidity is at 85%, and the wind speed is approximately 4.9 km/h, contributing to the harsh conditions. 
 The heating degree days (HDD) are at 12.2 GG, indicating a significant need for heating, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, showing no need for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take immediate action to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
